title: Document reproducible demo commands
goal: Expose the new reproducible demo commands in the main README and skills harness documentation so users can copy safe commands directly after the issue #2 CLI slices.
requiredInputs: README and docs/SKILLS_HARNESS.md currently had no demo quickstart
permissions: run local docs and CLI smoke checks
completionConditions: README lists demo manifest, demo runner, and sandbox commands
Product plan names demo as a scriptable harness command
verificationCommands: target/selfdev/jcode-harness demo run mock-provider-run-json --json | python3 -m json.tool >/dev/null
notes: Docs-only discoverability slice after `demo run --sandbox` landed.
